old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-8idy","title":"EDHOC: A_3 COSE Encrypt0 structure has 3-element list but 4th element implied","description":"PROTOCOL: The COSE Encrypt0 structure encoding for A_3 may not match RFC 9052.

Locations:
- Lines 688-694 (initiator)
- Lines 1054-1060 (responder)

Code:
zcbor_list_start_encode(zse_a3, 3);
zcbor_tstr_put_lit(zse_a3, 'Encrypt0');
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_a3, NULL, 0);      // protected
zcbor_bstr_encode_ptr(zse_a3, ctx->th_3, 32); // external_aad
zcbor_list_end_encode(zse_a3, 3);

Per RFC 9052 Section 5.3, Enc_structure for encryption is:
Enc_structure = [
  context : 'Encrypt0',
  protected : bstr,
  external_aad : bstr
]

This looks correct (3 elements). However, the comment at line 687/1052 says 'A_3 for AAD' but per RFC 9528, the AAD should be Enc_structure which includes TH_3 as external_aad.

This appears correct, but the code structure could be clearer. Low priority - mark for review.

Analyzing EDHOC A_3 Enc_structure per bead.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:45:51.789871Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:13:07.099488341Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:11:19.065970693Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:16:19.065970693Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:11:19.065970693Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: e0110a7a7. Refactored A_3 Enc_structure encoding into build_enc_structure() for clarity, removed duplicated code and outdated comments, now matches current interop pattern with Python ref impl."}

Refactored duplicated A_3 COSE_Encrypt0 encoding into reusable build_enc_structure helper (lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c:309). Matches Python interop, clarifies 3-element structure per RFC 9052 §5.3 vs implied concat for binding. Verified via edit and commit e0110a7a7.
